title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Verify Lens tenant data (app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) displays correctly in Poly Studio Mobile app under Poly Support/App for registered users
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or profile icon to access the side menu.
5. Tap on "App" within the Poly Support section.
6. Verify the displayed tenant data fields: App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connection Date.
7. Cross-reference the displayed values with the expected tenant data registered on the Lens tenant.
expected: All tenant data fields (App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last Connection Date) display accurate values matching the Lens tenant registration.
